'✕' : '☰'; // X to hamburger }); // Close on link click nav.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(function (link) { link.addEventListener('click', function () { nav.classList.remove('open'); toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); toggle.innerHTML = '☰'; }); }); } } ``` ### 6. CSS for Header/Navigation **File:** `/css/styles.css` (1826 lines) **Key Sections:** - `.site-header` (lines 209-218): Sticky position, blur backdrop, border - `.site-logo` (lines 226-236): Bebas Neue font, gold color - `.nav-links` (lines 238-254): Flex layout, gap 1.5rem - `.lang-switcher` (lines 256-278): Flex, gap 0.75rem, font-size 0.8rem - Mobile nav (lines 1665-1703): Hides nav-links, shows nav-toggle on <768px **Header Colors:** - Background: `rgba(15, 14, 23, 0.95)` (navy with transparency) - Logo/Active: `#d4a853` (gold) - Text: `#8b8a94` (muted gray) - Border: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)` ### 7. ``` **JavaScript Tab Handler** (lines 244-271 in main.js): ```javascript function initTabs() { document.querySelectorAll('.tabs').forEach(function (tabContainer) { var buttons = tabContainer.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn'); var panels = Array.from(tabContainer.parentElement.children).filter(function (el) { return el.classList.contains('tab-panel'); }); buttons.forEach(function (btn) { btn.addEventListener('click', function () { var target = btn.dataset.tab; buttons.forEach(function (b) { b.classList.remove('active'); b.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false'); }); panels.forEach(function (p) { p.classList.remove('active'); }); btn.classList.add('active'); btn.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true'); var panel = document.getElementById(target); if (panel) panel.classList.add('active'); }); }); }); } ``` **CSS Styles** (lines 1062-1125): - `.tabs`: Flex row, border-bottom, overflow-x auto - `.tab-btn`: Padding, border-bottom transparent, changes on active - `.celeb-tabs`: Border pills style with rounded corners - `.tab-panel`: `display: none` by default - `.tab-panel.active`: `display: block` ### 8. Asset Files **CSS:** - `/css/styles.css` (1826 lines, production stylesheet) **JavaScript:** - `/js/main.js` (282 lines) **Key JS Functions:** 1. `initCookieConsent()` - GA4 and cookie banner 2. `initForms()` - Form validation and submission 3. `initSmoothScroll()` - Smooth anchor scrolling 4. `initMobileNav()` - Hamburger menu toggle 5. `initTabs()` - Tab switching with GA4 tracking 6. GA4 tracking: CTA clicks, scroll depth, form submission ### 9. Responsive Breakpoints **Breakpoints in CSS:** - `@media (max-width: 1024px)`: Heading size adjustments - `@media (max-width: 768px)`: Full responsive redesign (nav, hero, grid layouts) - `@media (max-width: 480px)`: Small device optimizations ### Key Findings for Navigation Enhancement: 1. **Header NOT using partial**: The header is inlined in each page (not using `/partials/header.html`), so changes need to be made to each individual page 2. **Language switcher is separate**: Not part of main nav, positioned independently 3. **Mobile nav works well**: Icon changes from hamburger (☰) to X (✕) on open 4. **Tab system scopes correctly**: Uses `.parentElement.children` to find sibling panels, so nested tabs work without interference 5. **No existing breadcrumb logic**: Breadcrumbs are manually coded in HTML, not generated by JS 6. **Active links**: `.active` class on nav links for current page indicator 7. **Accessibility**: ARIA labels present, role attributes correct, but could be enhanced ### Files You'll Need to Modify: All HTML files (not using header partial): - `/index.html` (lines 41-61) - `/ru/index.html` (lines 41-61) - `/et/index.html` (lines 41-61) - All product pages, sample pages, about, faq, contact, privacy, terms, refund, 404 Stylesheets: - `/css/styles.css` (navigation, header, mobile styles) Scripts: - `/js/main.js` (navigation functionality already exists, may need enhancements) This is the complete architecture of the navigation system. The site uses a straightforward structure with inlined headers and a clean tab system for sample pages.
